violations.text: Dishes and scrubby pad were observed in the hand-washing sink in the lower-level storage/dish area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Items were removed at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (currently equipped with an air break). The air break is to be adjusted for a proper air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
